Actions.Text: AMEND AND RECOMMIT TO GOVERNMENTAL OPERATIONS
AMEND (T) AND RECOMMIT TO GOVERNMENTAL OPERATIONS

Title: Enacts the Census Enumerator Navigation Safety for Unimpeded Surveying Act
Summary: Supplements federal law regarding access by census enumerators to multi-residence buildings; provides for the development of guidance regarding access for building personnel.
ActClause: AN ACT to amend the executive law, in relation to enacting the "Census Enumerator Navigation Safety for Unimpeded Surveying Act"
